name: agenticmail
desc: Email, SMS & phone-call infrastructure for AI agents — send and receive real email and text messages, and place agent-driven outbound voice calls, all programmatically

name: agent-skills-standard
desc: A collection of Agent Skills Standard and Best Practice for Programming Languages, Frameworks that help our AI Agent follow best practies on frameworks and programming laguages

name: Equibles
desc: An open-source, self-hosted mini Bloomberg Terminal for AI agents — SEC filings, institutional holdings, insider trading, congressional trades, and short data from a single self-hosted stack.

name: mateclaw
desc: 🤖 MateClaw — Your second brain with Multi-Agent Orchestration, MCP Protocol, Skills & Memory, Dream, and Multi-Channel Support. Built on Spring AI Alibaba.

name: oh-my-coder
desc: Multi-Agent AI Coding Assistant - 支持 DeepSeek / GLM / MiMo 等 12+ 国产大模型，多智能体协作编程

name: worktrunk
desc: Worktrunk is a CLI for Git worktree management, designed for parallel AI agent workflows

name: executor
desc: The missing integration layer for AI agents. Let them call any OpenAPI / MCP / GraphQL / custom js functions in secure environment.

name: agent-context-protocol
desc: The Agent Context Protocol (ACP) is a documentation and planning system that enables AI agents to understand, build, and maintain complex software projects through structured knowledge capture. It transforms implicit project knowledge into explicit, machine-readable documentation that persists across agent sessions.

name: effGen
desc: [ICML 2026] effGen: Enabling Small Language Models as Capable Autonomous Agents

name: memind
desc: Self-evolving cognitive memory and context engine for AI agents in Java. Empowering 24/7 proactive agents like OpenClaw with understanding and SOTA performance.
